items.title: RAG quality requires hybrid retrieval, provenance, and evaluation
items.summary: DinoBrain retrieval should evolve beyond lexical search toward contextual chunks, BM25 plus dense hybrid retrieval, rank fusion, reranking, durable source provenance, canaries, and behavior evaluation. | Rule: When improving DinoBrain search, separate anchor-only sources from verified chunks, keep retrieval mode honest, and evaluate memory-on behavior against baselines. | Review: source_candidate_path=20_Wiki/Codex-Conversation-Registry.md reviewed_by=codex-mem01-migration-reapply reviewed_at=2026-07-06T23:29:34.574Z review_status=accepted_by_agent_review

items.title: Carry authorized work through commit, push, and deploy

items.title: Plan-first execution for new or handoff-heavy work
items.summary: The user prefers a concrete plan and approved scope before broad implementation, especially for handoff bundles, new projects, difficult design tasks, or OS-level changes. | Rule: When a task is broad, new, design-heavy, or handoff-driven, first summarize understanding, ask only necessary questions, lock the plan, then execute within that plan. | Review: source_candidate_path=20_Wiki/Codex-Conversation-Registry.md reviewed_by=codex-mem01-migration-reapply reviewed_at=2026-07-06T23:29:34.574Z review_status=accepted_by_agent_review
